descriptions.text: Sukeban Deka II: Shoujo Tekkamen Densetsu is an Adventure game, published by Sega, which was released in Japan in 1987.

Sukeban Deka the Movie 2: Counter-Attack from the Kazama Sisters (Japanese: スケバン刑事 風間三姉妹の逆襲, Hepburn: Sukeban Deka Kazama San Shimai no Gyakushū) is a live action Japanese film that was released in 1988. The is a sequel to the TV series Sukeban Deka III: Shōjo Ninpō-chō Denki, based on the manga series Sukeban Deka which was written and illustrated by Shinji Wada. It stars the TV series's lead Yui Asaka.
The movie was followed by a third, unrelated movie entitled Yo-Yo Girl Cop in the year 2006.
